character_designs.identity: 15-16-year-old Wallfoot hybrid girl, early New Blood figure, black-market survivor, and living challenge to pure-blood restoration logic

body_and_face.age_lock: Clearly 15-16, petite and quick, not adult and not a small child.
body_and_face.build: Compact, agile, light-footed, designed for narrow market alleys, kiln caves, hidden doors, and sudden exits.
body_and_face.face: Sharp youthful face, wary calculating eyes, sideways testing smile, soot and kiln-dust hints kept controlled.
body_and_face.hybrid_trait: Tiny dark-green scale arcs behind one ear only; subtle close-detail identity cue, not monster anatomy.
body_and_face.posture: Back-near-wall stance, one shoulder slightly guarded, hands ready to hide or cut a token cord.

constant_anchors: old yellow lining or pocket cloth
tiny dark-green scale arcs behind the ear
clean functional repair patches and sleeve-edge kiln dust

state_designs.silhouette: Short grey-blue jacket over terracotta inner cloth, compact layers, visible but detachable trade hang-points.
state_designs.color_logic: Wallfoot grey-blue and terracotta dominate; old yellow cloth and black wood provide survival-object contrast; dark-green scale arcs appear only in a close detail.
state_designs.damage_level: Used hard, repaired, kiln-dusted at sleeve edges, but complete and clean enough for movement.
required_details: stance should suggest she watches exits before people

state_designs.silhouette: Same Wallfoot core tightened for running and hiding, with deeper grey wrap and fewer exposed hang-points.
materials: deep grey shoulder cloth or short wrap
black wood pass pulled close to body
state_designs.color_logic: Grey-blue stays visible under deep grey escape cloth; terracotta flashes at collar and hem; black wood and pottery move closer to belt or pocket.
state_designs.damage_level: Travel wear, dust, and tightened cords only; no shredded thief costume.
required_details: trade tokens reduced or tucked inward

state_designs.silhouette: Wallfoot market structure under borrowed border scarf, short leather knee protection, and snow-dusted survival additions.
state_designs.color_logic: Snowline grey and frost sit over Wallfoot grey-blue and terracotta; Wallfoot objects remain visible so she does not become a Grey Wall soldier.
required_details: borrowed scarf must not become a uniform collar
black wood pass and pottery charm remain identity anchors
no Grey Wall badge or military armor

detail_panels.purpose: Lock Lu Qingli as a wary 15-16-year-old Wallfoot survivor.
detail_panels.notes: Youthful sharp face, quick eyes, guarded sideways smile, no adult femme-fatale reading.
Tiny dark-green arcs behind one ear, visible only in close detail.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry Wallfoot access, trade, and survival logic.
detail_panels.notes: Worn black wood, shaved corner, grey-blue cord, no readable text and no formal emblem.
Irregular terracotta shard, cracks, two-hole or corded fragment, worn by hand use.

detail_panels.purpose: Show how she survives through concealment and trade.
detail_panels.notes: Small functional stitches, old yellow cloth, compact fold, not a modern tactical pocket.

detail_panels.purpose: Connect to rope-cutting and escape choices.
detail_panels.notes: Short practical blade close to belt or inner fold; not a fantasy dagger display.

detail_panels.purpose: Tie her to Wallfoot kiln caves and market labor.
detail_panels.notes: Fine dust on sleeve edge, repair stitches, clean structure retained.

detail_panels.purpose: Show border survival overlay without turning her into a soldier.
detail_panels.notes: Old scarf, short leather knee guard, snow dust, no official badge.
